creator: lifanov@mail.lifanov.com
text:
Created attachment 159344
sysutils/debootstrap 1.0.70 -> 1.0.72

Please update sysutils/debootstrap to 1.0.72.
This is a patch from 1.0.70 because the 1.0.71 update PR was closed
as FIXED without a commit made:
https://bugs.freebsd.org/bugzilla/show_bug.cgi?id=201456

Fortunately, all 1.0.70 -> 1.0.71 changed was upstream part of our local patch.
This adds Ubuntu "wily" to supported distributions.
